title: Moroccan Blue Cheese Flaky Pastry
description: A savory pastry filled with a tangy blue cheese mixture, inspired by the flavors of Morocco.

ingredients.name: moroccan spice mix
ingredients.notes: ras el hanout or similar blend

instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry dough to a thickness of 3mm.
In a small bowl, mix together the blue cheese, moroccan spice mix, and salt.
Spread the blue cheese mixture evenly over one half of the pastry dough, leaving a 1cm border around the edges.
Fold the other half of the pastry dough over the filling, pressing the edges to seal.
Use a sharp knife to cut a few slits in the top of the pastry to allow steam to escape.
Brush the top of the pastry with a little water and sprinkle with chopped thyme.
Bake the pastry for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
